message:
fix(storage): harden symlink resolution for non-existent paths

The previous rel_path_cached fallback used manual component-based
normalization when the target didn't exist on disk, which failed to
resolve symlinks in parent directories — enabling path traversal.

- Replace manual normalization with canonicalize_with_existing_prefix()
  that walks up to the nearest existing ancestor, canonicalizes it,
  then appends the missing suffix
- Add path_existing_prefix_has_symlink() guard to ensure_dir() and
  atomic_write_bytes(), refusing to operate through symlinked paths
- Add tests for symlinked-parent rejection in rel_path_cached and
  write_text

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
